'''Gallo Memm''' was a [[Nimbanel/Legends|Nimbanel]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] who owned [[Streysel Island]] on the planet [[Vaynai/Legends|Vaynai]]. He was an enthusiastic collector of rare artifacts.
